overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a futuristic neon-lit city. The journey begins in a sunlit intersection with large holographic billboards, transitions into a dark urban canyon beneath elevated highways, and passes through areas with steam vents and parking garages. The environment features dense cyberpunk architecture with prominent neon signage and scattered pedestrians.

scene_state.functional_zone: open intersection with food stalls and billboards

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk through a sunlit intersection, passing street vendors and pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in brown jacket walking in same direction ahead of the player character

entered.detail: tall vertical digital billboard displaying 'FOODSCAPE' with Asian characters and beverage advertisement
red neon sign below the foodscape billboard
horizontal billboard on the right building facade
cluttered area with cardboard boxes, trash bags, and abandoned furniture on the sidewalk
multi-level highway overpass structure visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a bright sunlit urban intersection with the player character walking along a concrete sidewalk. A massive vertical 'FOODSCAPE' billboard dominates the center view, while street stalls and debris clutter the right side. Pedestrians walk scattered along the path, and vehicles move along the road to the left. The atmosphere is open and exposed with clear blue skies visible above.

scene_state.functional_zone: transition into covered commercial arcade under overpass

events.description: enters deep shadow cast by overhead highway structures, transitioning from bright sunlight to mixed artificial lighting
passes from open intersection into the enclosed urban canyon beneath elevated highways

agents.ego_description: continuing forward into a darker area, passing an NCPD police officer standing guard near the pawn shop entrance

notable_agents.action: police officer in tactical gear standing stationary near the pawn shop entrance

entered.detail: storefront with green trim and 'PAWN' signage, featuring a dark entrance
massive concrete pillar supporting the elevated highway above

segments.scene_description: The character moves from bright sunlight into the shadow of an elevated highway, passing a stationary police officer guarding a pawn shop on the right. The environment transitions from open to semi-covered as the sky becomes partially obscured by overpasses. The lighting shifts dramatically to a mix of natural and artificial sources, with neon signs becoming more prominent against the darkening surroundings.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial corridor under elevated highway

events.description: passing various neon storefronts including a cyber clinic with glowing green signage

agents.ego_description: walking through the dark urban canyon, observing the neon-lit storefronts and passing other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in shorts and tank top walking toward the camera

entered.detail: green neon sign reading 'CYBER' above a clinic entrance with medical symbols
circular green neon 'OPEN' sign hanging above a doorway
glowing directional arrows pointing toward businesses

segments.scene_description: Deep within the urban canyon beneath massive highway overpasses, the scene is dominated by artificial neon lighting. The player walks past a cyber clinic with bright green signage and various neon advertisements illuminating the dark corridor. The space feels enclosed and narrow, with the elevated highway structure now directly overhead and the sky mostly blocked from view.

scene_state.functional_zone: parking garage entrance with steam vents and construction barriers

events.description: approaching parking garage entrance with visible steam rising from ground vents

agents.ego_description: walking past the parking garage entrance, navigating around construction barriers and steam vents

entered.detail: parking garage entrance with yellow 'MARK 24' signage and green roll-up doors
ground vent emitting thick white steam into the street
yellow and black striped barriers blocking off part of the sidewalk
red and blue billboards with 'FEEL FREE' text mounted on the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a parking garage entrance marked 'MARK 24' with steam rising from street vents and construction barriers blocking part of the walkway. The environment is entirely enclosed with no visible sky, illuminated by artificial lights and neon signs. New billboards reading 'FEEL FREE' appear overhead as the player navigates around the steam and barriers.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit corridor continuing under elevated highway

agents.ego_description: continuing down the neon-lit street, following a couple walking ahead under the overpass

notable_agents.action: couple walking together in the distance ahead of the player

entered.detail: large industrial pipes running along the ceiling of the overpass

segments.scene_description: The final segment continues through the dark urban corridor beneath the elevated highway, with industrial pipes visible overhead and neon storefronts lining the right side. The player follows a couple walking ahead as the 'FEEL FREE' billboards remain visible on the left. The environment maintains its enclosed, cyberpunk atmosphere with mixed neon and artificial lighting illuminating the path forward.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open urban intersection into a claustrophobic, neon-lit urban canyon. It begins on a sunlit concrete sidewalk dominated by a massive vertical Foodscape billboard and scattered pedestrians under a clear blue sky. As the character advances, the scene shifts into the shadow of an elevated highway, passing a police officer and a pawn shop while the natural light fades in favor of emerging neon signs. The environment then narrows into a dark corridor beneath massive overpasses, where the sky vanishes and the path is illuminated by a green cyber clinic and various artificial advertisements. Finally, the camera moves past steam vents and construction barriers toward a parking garage entrance, continuing through an enclosed industrial space lined with pipes and Feel Free billboards.
